title: Traveller's Boots
description: This mod adds 5 types of boots to speed up the exploration. Inspired by Boots Of The Traveler from Thaumcraft.
body:
## Traveller's Boots: Reloaded
This small mod adds 5 types of boots, which can help you to speed up exploring the world and gives you several buffs and increases your step height for easier world exploration. This mod is mostly focused on providing early-game way to travel, while not overbuffing the player without any reasons.

![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c79a1a5ea66163aa13b961f47f7fd0bf9b24aa08.png)
![Available for Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/450988ee1e099a80a4b3f1e0ce9671d822c94cf4.png)
![Requires Architectury API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e713d4a7eb9c8c14aba12f7003618d9e849ed2.png)

**Traveller's Boots MK1** ![](https://imgur.com/2WO6c9Z.png)

- Gives Speed II, while wearing.
- Gives +1 armor point, while wearing.
- Can be repaired with Leather.

**Traveller's Boots MK2** ![](https://imgur.com/gpsAM6m.png)

- Gives Speed III, while wearing.
- Increases step height, while wearing.
- Gives +2 armor points, while wearing.
- Can be repaired with Gold Ingots.

**Traveller's Boots MK3** ![](https://imgur.com/h3GpwAY.png)

- Gives Speed IV, while wearing.
- Increases step height, while wearing.
- Gives +4 armor points, while wearing.
- Can be repaired with Diamonds.

**Traveller's Boots MK4** ![](https://imgur.com/BfALbWW.png)

- Gives Speed V, while wearing.
- Gives Jump Boost II, while wearing.
- Increases step height, while wearing.
- Gives 6 armor points, while wearing.
- Can be repaired with Emeralds.

**Traveller's Boots MK5** ![](https://imgur.com/ZVUt2UC.png)

- Gives Speed VI, while wearing.
- Gives Jump Boost III, while wearing.
- Increases step height, while wearing.
- Gives +8 armor points, while wearing.
- Can be repaired with Netherite Scraps.

Traveller's Boots tiers can be configured through the config file, speed modifiers, jump modifiers, armor points and step height ability is brought up to your needs. Everything is configurable.
